data.content: Implementation review approved. Reviewed branch codex/9a05-overview-lease-actions against origin/main, including commits 01c3f5be266b1dc1be0d38127e5f62d43ac38622 and f9364012191b1d179d2f1b0e6e538153ee06642d. No blocking findings. Verified scope: header removal, active lease info, focus/release actions, rollback route, overview grouping/sizing/id behavior, and lease_agent mapper fallback. Gates are green: bun run lint; bunx tsc --noEmit; bun run test; bun run build.
